directions_tried.name: Phase 0: Verify E007 counterexample and SZZ framework
directions_tried.outcome: Conjecture 1 FALSE (λ_max(M)=24). Revised conjecture on Hessian.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2B: Derive and prove Hessian bound
directions_tried.outcome: Hessian formula derived+verified. |λ(H)|≤4d holds numerically. D+C proof approach dead (decoherence false d≥3, anti-correlation false). d=2 proved. d≥3 open — concavity most promising.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Verify E007 counterexample and clarify SZZ Hessian
explorations_completed.key_finding: Conjecture 1 FALSE. Hessian has curvature correction.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Derive Wilson action Hessian formula analytically
explorations_completed.key_finding: Hessian formula derived and verified to 1.4e-6.
Conditional proof via D+C. Mass gap depends on |λ_min|.
Decoherence FALSE for d≥3. TRUE for d=2 (proved).
Anti-correlation bound FALSE. Norm-additive pathway dead.
